title: [Deep Freeze, Cave of Ice]
description: The light is so dim that you fail to see the huge mound of ice until you are upon it!  Peering closely, you discover that the mass is an ice-glazed titan who is sitting -- staring eyes opened wide and quite dead!

wayto.3480: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'north'
